# Screenshots

Place your project screenshots in this folder with these exact filenames:

| Filename               | Project              |
|------------------------|----------------------|
| `cabinet-ichraf.png`   | Cabinet Ichraf MVP   |
| `firstparc.png`        | FirstParc Fleet Mgmt |
| `gdepot.png`           | G-Depot Warehouse    |
| `events.png`           | Event Management     |
| `chatbot.png`          | AI Chatbot           |

Recommended size: **600 × 360 px** (16:9 landscape, PNG or JPEG).

If a file is missing, the card will show a placeholder automatically.
